title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Judge, Carrot, Unknown person #15 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Tastes good, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SANJ!!! You better not be feeding that damn rat again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Royals must never serve others! How many times must I tell you this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mother has long passed!! There is no merit and nothing to be gained from following the legacy of the dead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For whatever reason, you were not gifted with the aptitude and talents of your siblings!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As such, it is your duty to work hundreds, no... thousands of times harder than the others!! You will be a part of...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and contribute to the plans I have set for the future of German! Being a disappointment and lagging behind is not an option!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare ever prepare another meal again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, I have no choice but to laugh along with them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't, I'll just be bullied too. I really don't want that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Owwie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No improvements ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He has 0 potential!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's an utter waste of space and air.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think we'd lose him in an accident... this is beyond a tragedy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was going to be one of the 5 pillars that were to lead the germa into the future... and yet, here I stand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the wake of a son for whom I had such high hopes for.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why won't this thing come off?! Guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's the big idea?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he seriously go and die on us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is me... caring... besides, he was completely useless anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hold on a SEC!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't want to stay here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let me out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't leave me here... it's so scary! I'm gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Please, speak with my father!! Father... help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're trying to kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are all work- ing under the direct orders of the King himself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He wished to wipe the slate clean and start over in a world... where you were never born to begin with.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Let me out... Please, Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm... I'm so sorry!! I'm so sorry for being born a weaking!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Help!!! Father, save me!!! Father- Rrr!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A tragic, heart- breaking fate.

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Garchu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Welcome, straw hats!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Welcome!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Garchu!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Garchu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Uwaah!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
